# Visa Signature Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.

![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Card Benefits and Features
### Banking Benefits
  * 2 Reward Points for every ₹200 spent.
  * Up to 3 free add-on cards for your family


![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * Save up to ₹8,300 yearly on lounge access (Priority Pass, $99 value).
  * Save on fuel costs, assuming ₹6,000 spent monthly on fuel annually.


View More 
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Transaction Benefits
  * Get Up to 50 days of interest-free credit period from the date of purchase.
  * This offer is subject to the submission of the charge by the merchant.
  * For fraudulent transactions report immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24/7 Call Centre.


View More 
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Management & Controls
  2. ### Credit & Safety
  3. ### Contactless Payment
  4. ### Fees and Charges
  5. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  Card Management & Controls 
  * **Single Interface  
**One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans
  * **Spends tracking  
**Simple interface to track all your spends
  * **Reward Points  
**View and redeem points at the push of a button


Note: Unredeemed CashPoints will expire/ lapse after 2 years of accumulation.
![Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Credit & Safety 
  * Revolving Credit is available at a nominal interest rate.
  * (Check the [​fees and charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/visa-signature-credit-card/fees-and-charges) section for more details).
  * Get Up to 50 days of interest-free credit from the date of purchase.
  * The offer is subject to submission of the charge by the merchant.
  * Zero liability for fraudulent transactions if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24/7 Call Centre
  * Stay protected against unauthorised use when you shop anywhere with EMV Chip Card technology.


![Credit & Safety](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless Payment 
  * Visa Signature Credit Card is enabled* for Contactless Payments at retail outlets.


Note:
  * In India, contactless payments up to ₹5,000 don't require a PIN for a single transaction.
  * For amounts of ₹5,000 or more, the Cardholder must enter the Credit Card PIN.
  * You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.


![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees and Charges 
**​Annual fees and charges**
  * First-year fee free on spending ₹ 15,000 within the first 90 days.
  * Renewal fee waiver on spending ₹ 75,000 in a year.
  * **Cash advance fee:** 2.5%, with a minimum of ₹ 500, applicable on all cash withdrawals.
  * **Interest:** 3.49% will be charged on any outstanding amount carried beyond the bill due date. 
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/visa-signature-credit-card/most-important-terms-and-conditions.pdf) to know more.


![Fees and Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * The [Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/visa-signature-credit-card/terms-and-conditions) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  Is the Visa Signature Credit Card free? 
The HDFC Bank **Visa Signature Credit Card** has an annual fee. However, you can get your first year's membership free by spending ₹15,000 within the first 90 days. You can also renew your membership for free by spending ₹75,000 in a year. 
###  What are the benefits of a Visa Signature Credit Card? 
The HDFC Bank Visa Signature Credit Card offers unparalleled travel benefits, a rewarding **rewards** program, savings on **lounge access** and fuel costs, free add-on cards, enhanced safety features, and interest-free credit for up to 50 days.
###  What is a Visa Signature Credit Card?
The HDFC Bank**Visa Signature Credit Card** is a premium card that offers exclusive benefits, **rewards,** and privileges to cardholders. Enjoy various travel benefits, reward points, CashBack, and savings.
###  How to apply for a Visa Signature Credit Card?
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank Visa Signature Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other Credit Cards that may suit your needs. Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
